objective_sequence.focus: protect capital, validate live execution, confirm clean micro behavior
evaluate first trade clusters; edge vs noise
stabilize best setups, suppress weak paths, tiny scaling only if gates pass
compound proven paths, careful throughput, strengthen learning loops
controlled small machine only if metrics support

daily_monitoring_checklist: Kill switch reachable + tested on schedule (paper ok if live frozen).
Exchange connectivity + auth expiry + clock skew.
Order intent vs placement vs fills reconciliation (every session).
Fees + realized slippage vs baseline (per product).
Open interest / exposure vs caps; daily loss budget consumption.
WS / REST error rates + circuit breaker trips.
Databank append-only continuity (trade_events tail + checksum if enabled).
Scanner + opportunity bot outputs vs execution bot allowlist.
Post-trade classifications written for every close.
Orchestration truth chain / deployment fingerprint vs expected.
Halt flags + scaling gate state (no drift vs written policy).
risk_escalation_ladder: Level 0: auto metrics only — OPS handles within playbooks.
Level 1: caution band on any execution metric — reduce size or frequency per policy.
Level 2: danger on health OR two unexplained errors — pause new entries; RESEARCH + human.
Level 3: kill switch / catastrophic — halt; full RCA before resume. See data/control/halt_rules.json.
milestone_states_ref: inline section K in operator docs; machine-readable milestones optional extension

days_1_14.objective: Prove venue session, read-only + smallest-risk probes; no optimization.
monitor: Order placement dry path then minimal live size

days_1_14.objective: Repeat venue proof with alternate window; measure slippage on smallest size.
databank_and_reports: venue latency note in daily diagnosis
ceo_evening_review: Whether venue is acceptable for micro week

days_1_14.objective: Stress daemon continuity: restarts, reconnects, duplicate prevention under light flow.
First intentional pattern trades only from frozen allowlist; measure EV vs realized.
databank_and_reports: setup type rollup in daily diagnosis

days_1_14.objective: Execution quality trend: fees+slippage as % of gross; tighten if rising.
success: fees_to_pnl_ratio in green/caution per dashboard doc
ceo_evening_review: Whether to keep same micro cap

days_1_14.objective: Reproducibility check — similar setups should behave similarly (variance, not copy-paste PnL).
success: Narrative links between context and outcome

days_1_14.objective: End week-1 proof: micro behavior clean; decide flat vs reduce for week 2.
ceo_evening_review: Explicit notional plan for days 8–14 (flat/down only unless gates green)

days_1_14.objective: Begin first-20-trades style clustering; rank setups by post-fee expectancy (honest sample).
success: At least 8 closed trades lifetime OR documented low-activity reason

days_1_14.objective: Latency + friction diagnosis: where time is lost from signal to fill.
success: Mitigation ticket or config experiment queued (advisory)
pause_or_review_triggers: p95 beyond SLO with rising errors

days_1_14.objective: Hold variables flat; repeat measurement day (science, not heroics).
success: PnL not the primary success signal

days_1_14.objective: Edge vs noise: bootstrap CI on expectancy; no scaling decisions from point estimates.
success: Written statement: edge candidate vs insufficient evidence
ceo_evening_review: What would falsify the edge thesis next week?

days_1_14.objective: Sizing policy fork: only flat or reduce unless scaling_gates.json satisfied (machine check).
success: Explicit tomorrow sizing from gates only
pause_or_review_triggers: Any discretionary size change without gate artifact
databank_and_reports: scaling gate evaluation stub in envelope
ceo_evening_review: Tomorrow size decision with evidence pointers

days_1_14.objective: Suppress worst setup path automatically if policy wiring exists; else manual ban list.
Close first fortnight: go/no-go for phase 3 (days 15–30) tiny scaling track.
monitor: All dashboards green or explained cautions
success: Written phase decision: STABLE_MICRO vs REDUCE vs HALT_REVIEW
ceo_evening_review: Explicit policy for days 15–21 notional + frequency

weekly_blocks.operating_priority: Stabilize best setups; keep weak paths dead; throughput only if gates green.
weekly_blocks.notional_policy: Flat to +10% vs prior week only if all scaling global requirements pass.
weekly_blocks.scale_policy: No new products; no shorter cooldown; notional step max +10% once.
weekly_blocks.validation_focus: Per-setup expectancy stability; drawdown speed; fee drag.
weekly_blocks.learning_focus: Post-trade reviews → concrete suppress/promote list with evidence IDs.
weekly_blocks.bots_optimize: Opportunity bot: precision; Execution bot: latency; Risk bot: tail loss; Learning bot: cluster updates.

weekly_blocks.operating_priority: Continue stabilization; prepare tiny scaling proof window days 31+.
weekly_blocks.notional_policy: Default flat; one notional step only if week 15–21 ended green across execution metrics.
weekly_blocks.scale_policy: Cooldown shortening still blocked; search pressure widening blocked.
weekly_blocks.validation_focus: Slippage stability week-on-week; fill quality; duplicate stays zero.
weekly_blocks.learning_focus: Cross-venue lessons; time-of-day discipline; inventory model checks if spot.
weekly_blocks.bots_optimize: Comparison bot: sim vs live deltas; Review bot: anomaly false positives down.

weekly_blocks.operating_priority: Compound only proven paths; increase throughput carefully with doubled monitoring.
weekly_blocks.notional_policy: Stepwise increases per scaling_gates.json only; max one gate change per 5 trading days.
weekly_blocks.scale_policy: May allow cooldown shorten OR search widen (one only) if gates + human note satisfied.
weekly_blocks.validation_focus: Profit factor persistence; max DD velocity; incident rate near zero.
weekly_blocks.learning_focus: Mission/goals bot pacing vs actual validation depth — prevent fake acceleration.
weekly_blocks.bots_optimize: Mission bot: honest pace scoring; CEO bot: weekly promotion/demotion recommendations advisory.

weekly_blocks.operating_priority: If metrics support: become a controlled small machine — repeatable ops, low drama.
weekly_blocks.trade_count_target_range: 20–45 closed trades/week subject to error budget = 0
weekly_blocks.notional_policy: Notional tied to rolling expectancy CI narrowing; stop sizing up if CI widens.
weekly_blocks.scale_policy: Aggressive deployment gate may be considered only if separate CEO+human artifact exists.
weekly_blocks.validation_focus: End-to-end autonomy discipline; halt/rollback drills; chaos readiness.
weekly_blocks.learning_focus: Automation of suppression + sizing helpers; human time on exceptions only.
weekly_blocks.bots_optimize: All bots: reduce false positives; tighten writes to durable stores; improve escalation clarity.
no_mid_block_changes: Venue fee schedule assumptions without re-proof

entry: 7+ clean trading days with execution metrics green/caution-only
min 30 closed trades on primary path OR 20 with narrow CI above zero expectancy post-fee
all conditions in scaling_gates.json gate increase_max_notional
weekly CEO review answers 'stable enough to scale' with evidence IDs
any halt_rules.json automatic_response triggered at halt level
